name: Dependency Mapping
what_it_is: Identifying sequential and parallel dependencies in an execution plan - what must happen before what, and what can run simultaneously.
core_mechanic: List all tasks. Draw dependency arrows. Identify critical path (determines minimum completion time). Flag external dependencies. Identify float (tasks that can slip without affecting critical path).
when_to_use: Complex execution with multiple workstreams / Timelines feel uncertain and you need to understand why / Before committing to a deadline / Need to know what to accelerate
when_not_to_use: Simple linear execution / Exploratory work where steps aren't yet known
ideaos_application: Agent 3 maps top 3-5 dependencies, identifies the critical path item, flags the external dependency most likely to cause a slip.
